sql.if: AND (APPLY_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR PHONE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM TB_CERTIFICATE_APPLY WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
ORDER BY REG_DT DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{amount}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CERTIFICATE_APPLY WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT * FROM TB_CERTIFICATE_APPLY WHERE CERT_SEQ = #{certSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_CERTIFICATE_APPLY SET ISSUE_STATUS = #{issueStatus},
ISSUE_DT = NOW(), REJECT_RSN = NULL
REJECT_RSN = #{rejectRsn}, ISSUE_DT = NULL
REJECT_RSN = NULL, ISSUE_DT = NULL
WHERE CERT_SEQ = #{certSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CERTIFICATE_APPLY ( CERT_TYPE, ISSUE_STATUS, APPLY_NM, PHONE, EMAIL, USE_PURPOSE, BELONG_TO, REMARK, REG_DT, DEL_YN ) VALUES ( #{certType}, 'WAIT', #{applyNm}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{usePurpose}, #{belongTo}, #{remark}, NOW(), 'N' )
